# 依赖

## 项目

|名称|版本|官网|描述|
|:--|:--|:--|:--|
|fltk|1.3.8|https://github.com/fltk/fltk|GUI工具|
|json|3.11.2|https://github.com/nlohmann/json|JSON工具|
|ggml|master|https://github.com/ggerganov/ggml|模型训练推理框架|
|faiss|1.7.4|https://github.com/facebookresearch/faiss|向量数据库|
|ollama|0.3.3|https://github.com/ollama/ollama|语言模型部署工具|
|spdlog|1.12.0|https://github.com/gabime/spdlog|日志工具|
|OpenCV|4.10.0|https://github.com/opencv/opencv|机器视觉工具|
|yaml-cpp|0.8.0|https://github.com/jbeder/yaml-cpp|YAML工具|
|cpp-httplib|0.16.2|https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib|HTTP工具|
|ElasticSearch|8.7.1|https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch|向量数据库|
|ChineseWordVectors|master|https://github.com/Embedding/Chinese-Word-Vectors|中文词嵌入库|
|stable-diffusion.cpp|master|https://github.com/leejet/stable-diffusion.cpp|StableDiffusion绘画工具|

|:--|:--|
|chinese-poetry|https://github.com/chinese-poetry/chinese-poetry|
